completion_summary: Implemented and release-gate validated an energy/equipment-limited multicomponent differential batch vacuum concentration model with declared-temperature property profiles, gamma-Raoult VLE, sensible/latent energy, condenser/vent ledgers, volatile-target protection, endpoint events, analytic energy and Rayleigh checks, deterministic domain sweep, WF-00 provider contract/model card, and vNext runtime-addition adapter; v0.3 routes and shared proxy remain unchanged.
notes: Independent WF-30 concentrate slice only. No edits to existing flash/heat-transfer modules, v0.3 runtime, tasks, maturity, shared routes, or proxy removal; WF-110 integrates and refreezes behavior after review.
scope: Energy- and equipment-limited multicomponent batch vacuum concentration with declared VLE/property profiles, condenser recovery, volatile-target loss, endpoint events, material/volume/energy closure, and a vNext runtime proposal
